parsed.production_notes: The video features a split-screen with a human actor on the bottom and a 3D animated AI avatar on the top. The human is recorded, while the avatar is computer-generated.

characters.appearance: Young female, slender build, fair complexion, red hair styled in a high bun. She has large green eyes, a small nose, and a soft, friendly face.
characters.wardrobe: White top, gold hoop earrings with a small dangling charm.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, fair complexion, short dark hair, and a short beard. He has dark eyes and thick eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue collared shirt, white wireless earbuds.

scenes.setting: Top panel: A cozy bedroom with warm lighting, a bed, and string lights. Bottom panel: A plain, light-colored wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young woman with red hair in a bun is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera. She is wearing a white top and gold hoop earrings. The background is a softly lit bedroom with a bed, pillows, and string lights. A banner with Spanish flags hangs across the top of the frame. Her expression is friendly and engaging.

A young man with short dark hair and a beard is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera. He is wearing a dark blue collared shirt and white wireless earbuds. The background is a plain, light-colored wall. His expression changes from hesitant to engaged as he speaks.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen video with a 3D animated female avatar on top and a live-action male on the bottom. They are having a conversation. Text overlays appear in the center of the screen, translating their dialogue. A green checkmark appears when the man corrects his Spanish.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Hablas español? [Do you speak Spanish?]
Character B says: Sí, yo conozco español. [Yes, I know Spanish.]
Character A says: Técnicamente es correcto. Pero los hablantes nativos simplemente dicen, hablo español. [Technically it's correct. But native speakers simply say, I speak Spanish.]
Character B says: Hablo español. [I speak Spanish.]
Character A says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]
Character B says: Soy 24. [I am 24.]
Character A says: Quieres decir, tengo 24 años? [You mean, I have 24 years?]
Character B says: Tengo 24 años. [I am 24 years old.]
Character A says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What is your name?]
Character B says: Mi nombre es Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Los hablantes nativos normalmente dicen, me llamo Gustavo. [Native speakers normally say, I call myself Gustavo.]
Character B says: Me llamo Gustavo. [My name is Gustavo.]
Character A says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]
Character B says: Gracias. Pero ¿Quién eres? [Thank you. But who are you?]
Character A says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así todos los días para aprender español. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We can talk like this every day to learn Spanish.]
Character B says: Ah, pero mi español es A1. No puedo hablar. [Ah, but my Spanish is A1. I can't speak.]
Character A says: No te preocupes. Puedo enseñarte en tu lengua materna mientras aprendes español. [Don't worry. I can teach you in your mother tongue while you learn Spanish.]
Character B says: ¿Conoces mi idioma? [Do you know my language?]
Character A says: Claro. Soy una IA. [Of course. I am an AI.]
Character B says: Está bien. Voy a descargar esta aplicación. [Okay. I'm going to download this app.]

scenes.visual_description: A white screen with the Praktika logo in the center. Below the logo are the Google Play and App Store badges.

praktika.ai
